docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF BRANDINEZ PORTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SID PORTER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
